title: rosa × dumetorum var. interposita
intro: Rosa × dumetorum var. interposita, also known as Rosa × dumetorum var. interposita, is a rare and lesser-known variety of rose plant that is a hybrid of Rosa dumetorum and Rosa gallica. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum var. interposita include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Rosa × dumetorum var. interposita is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions.
